texto: When people want to be rid of Heaven it is logical to start by creating an atmosphere in which spiritual things appear out of place; in order to be able to declare successfully that God is unreal they have to construct around man a false reality, a reality that is inevitably inhuman because only the inhuman can exclude God. What is involved is a falsification of the imagination and so its destruction.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Frithjof Schuon sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. A afirmação “When people want to be rid of Heaven it is logical to start by creating an atmosphere in which sp…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a fe, heaven, religion, útil em momentos de religion e society.

texto: Spiritual realization is theoretically the easiest thing and in practice the most difficult thing there is. It is the easiest because it is enough to think of God. It is the most difficult because human nature is forgetfulness of God.
explicacao: Citação de Frithjof Schuon sobre temas ligados a fe. “Spiritual realization is theoretically the easiest thing and in practice the most difficult thing…” articula fe, perennial-philosophy, religion em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como religion.

texto: The esoteric finds the Absolute within the traditions, as poets find poetry within the poems.
explicacao: Citação de Frithjof Schuon sobre temas ligados a fe. “The esoteric finds the Absolute within the traditions, as poets find poetry within the poems.” articula fe, perennial-philosophy, religions em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como religions e unity.

texto: The materialists, or some of them, would have us believe that the brain produces thoughts as an organ secretes fluids; this is to overlook What constitutes the very essence of thought, namely the materially unexplainable miracle of subjectivity: as if the cause of consciousness - immaterial and non-spatial by definition - could be a material object.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Frithjof Schuon: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “The materialists, or some of them, would have us believe that the brain produces thoughts as an o…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, materialism, materialists pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de dia-chuvoso e reflexao.

texto: In relation to Monotheism considered as such, Judaism stabilized but “confiscated” the Message; Christianity universalized but “altered” it; Islam in turn restored it by stabilizing and universalizing it.

texto: It is impossible to describe a landscape so validly as to exclude all other descriptions, for no one can see the landscape in all its aspects at the same time, and no single view can prevent the existence and validity of other equally possible views.
explicacao: Citação de Frithjof Schuon sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “It is impossible to describe a landscape so validly as to exclude all other descriptions, for no …” articula reflexao, open-mindedness, perspective em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como perspective e tolerance.
